title: Senior Software Engineer - Swiggy - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Swiggy - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Swiggy in Agra offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Swiggy:
Swiggy is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy!
